#  View Revision Related Specification Item 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * Only one related item can be added at a time. Repeat the process to add additional items, as necessary.
  * Only items that already exist in Procore can be selected. Attachments cannot be directly added as a related item.
  * Most items in Procore can be attached as a related item. If a specific item type does not appear as a selectable option, this means it cannot be attached as a related item.
  * After a related item is added, a link shows in the Description column. Users can only view and open related items that they have access to.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click the desired specification area you want to view the info for.  
OR  
Click **Info**![Icon Info3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8daa3c2524fc6852f143ae85122ba667/6cc6417d2c59aeda0bd76d801eb8e870/icon-info3.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon next to a specification.
  3. Click **Revisions Related Items** tab.   
This displays the list of all the revision related items for the selected specification revision number.
  4. Click **+Link Related Item** to link a new revision related specification item.
  5. Click ![Icon Delete Trash6](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1dbb3da647413c8d26d99a2503cae34a/e42448ea8213372016febd013f8b7532/trash-icon.png?fm=webp&h=15) to delete a revision related item.


## See Also
  * [View Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-specifications)
  * [View Spec Related Specification Item](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-spec-related-specification-item)
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Packages - Introduction](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-packages-introduction)
